heroHeadline: Day 39: NATO Allies Divided Over US Base Access; Istanbul Consulate Shooting Kills 3
heroSubtitle: European NATO states split over granting US basing and overflight rights for Iran operations; three killed near Israeli consulate in Istanbul; US-Israeli strikes continue in northern Iran.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-07. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
